description.goal: Create a simple cinematic short video around ten seconds long: a watchmaker fixes one broken watch before midnight.

_execution_debug.eval_summary: The blueprint masterfully expands the simple source text into a compelling micro-thriller, maintaining tight focus and clear dramatic tension. All elements, from character motivation to location details and story beats, align perfectly to create a coherent and engaging short narrative within the requested constraints.

cast.flaw: His perfectionism sometimes leads to him cutting deadlines very close, and his aging hands occasionally betray him.
cast.motivation: To honor his craft, save a valuable antique watch for a client, and prove he still possesses his legendary skill, despite his age.
cast.name: Elias
cast.profile: An elderly, highly skilled watchmaker known for his unparalleled precision, whose passion for timepieces defines his life.

locations.description: A dimly lit, cozy workshop overflowing with intricate tools, tiny gears, and antique clocks of various sizes, with a prominent grandfather clock dominating one corner, its pendulum swinging rhythmically.
locations.name: Elias's Workshop

content.logline: A meticulous watchmaker races against the clock, making a critical repair just moments before midnight.

scene_outline.conflict: Elias fights against the clock and the minute details of the watch mechanism, under immense time pressure.
scene_outline.goal: To successfully complete the intricate watch repair.
scene_outline.turn: The grandfather clock begins its pre-chime whir, signaling mere seconds until midnight.

scene_outline.conflict: The absolute final moment of precision against the ultimate deadline.
scene_outline.goal: To see the watch work and meet the deadline.
scene_outline.turn: The watch ticks to life, immediately followed by the chime of midnight.

story_arc.conflict: Elias battles against the rapidly dwindling time and the intricate, unforgiving mechanics of the watch, pushing his own aging precision to its limits.
story_arc.summary: Elias, hunched over a complex watch, struggles with a final, minute component as a prominent grandfather clock in his workshop ticks relentlessly towards midnight.
story_arc.turning_point: The grandfather clock's chiming mechanism begins to whir, signaling the imminent strike of midnight, intensifying Elias's urgency.

story_arc.conflict: The tension peaks as Elias's skill, determination, and the unforgiving deadline collide in one delicate action.
story_arc.summary: With a final, trembling but determined hand, Elias precisely places the last component. The watch immediately begins to tick, just as the grandfather clock solemnly chimes midnight.
story_arc.turning_point: The instant sound of the watch ticking, confirming the repair's success, juxtaposed with the clock striking midnight, marking the deadline met.
